name: Dubai International Airport (DXB)
description: Dubai's main international airport. Terminals 1, 2, and 3.

name: Dubai Marina
description: A canal-side district lined with high-rises, cafes, and the Marina Walk promenade.

name: DIFC Gate Village
description: The Dubai International Financial Centre — offices by day, galleries and restaurants by night.

name: Dubai Mall
description: One of the world's largest malls, next to the Burj Khalifa and the Dubai Fountain.

name: Kite Beach
description: A laid-back beach on Jumeirah Road, known for kitesurfing, skate ramps, and food trucks.

name: Burj Khalifa
description: The tallest building in the world; observation decks on the 124th, 125th, and 148th floors.

name: Palm Jumeirah
description: The palm-shaped artificial island lined with beach resorts and residences.

name: JBR Beach
description: Jumeirah Beach Residence — a busy beachfront with a walking strip called The Walk.

name: Global Village
description: A seasonal cultural festival park (usually October–April) with pavilions from ~90 countries.

name: Al Fahidi Historical District
description: Restored wind-tower houses and quiet lanes in old Bur Dubai. Museums, cafes, small galleries.

name: Etihad Park
description: An open-air concert and event venue on Yas Island-style waterfront in Dubai.

name: Ravi Restaurant
description: A Dubai institution in Satwa — famous for late-night Pakistani cooking at kind-to-your-wallet prices.
